channel.title: UserLand on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in UserLand on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to install and run any Linux OS on Android using UserLAnd.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NWOgcclp_lk/YtmGiZQcneI/AAAAAAAAMmo/_7nDPLnyUJAJGHlPyufowsEUkoqo--AcQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1658422909972967-0.png" alt=""> Computer is a hardware device made up of numerous technologies to run a operating system that was a software developed using various programming languages currently there are two types of operating systems Terminal and GUI aka Graphical User Interface that you can access on computer and do alot of real life works electronically or digitally using different additional softwares supported by operating system which you can install and run inside a operating system it’s like software inside software.
